pages.title: about
pages.text: 我学校：GUET专业：信息与计算科学爱好：篮球🏀、游泳、跑步 同时也是一名业余码农，打算先学习linux（鸟哥的私房菜好厚啊） 江河是向海的路

posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment console.error("Error: [hexo-tag-aplayer] Specified asset file not found (“https://p1.music.126.net/TUGO1gz0hq_f00o4DN0ocg==/80264348833252.jpg?param=34y34”)");
